case_title: OLD DOMINION FREIGHT LINE, INC. VS. CENTR BRANDS USA LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 74251394), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF OLD DOMINION FREIGHT LINE, INC. SERVED AUG-23-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CENTR BRANDS USA LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
